items.title: Join Our Livestream: Musk v. Altman and the Future of OpenAI
items.summary: On May 8, we’re going live to answer your questions about the Musk v. Altman trial that could determine the fate of OpenAI.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
